calendar.matters:
Hearing On The Petition For Change Of Name Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Dec-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Beldon Yee, #2647.

Petitioners Yirong Chen and Wanhong Li were present in pro per as Guardians ad litem for the minor, Hao Yu Chen.
Petitioners were placed under oath and examined.
Lihong Tan was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioners.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Denny Haoyu Chen.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-03-2009 Off Calendar
